== Notes for [[Item:Q80847|Q80847]] ==

ID: I86643

Name: Claudius Appelinius

Given Name: Claudius

Surname: Appelinius

Sex: M

_UID: F4E58C16B443944AA8D36E14AF3448037B0C

Change Date: 18 Oct 2005

Birth: ABT 160

Death: deceased

Marriage 1 Basina Severus b: 183

Married:

Children

Claudia Appelinius b: ABT 200

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I86643

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
